faqPage.metaDescription: Answers to the most common questions about Robust Nordic products and ordering.
faqPage.title: Frequently asked questions
faqPage.subtitle: Find answers to common questions below. If you can't find the answer, get in touch.
faqPage.q1: What ingredients are the products made from?
faqPage.a1: We use only high-quality, clinically studied ingredients from reliable suppliers in the EU and worldwide. Every batch is tested at a third-party laboratory.
faqPage.q2: Are the products vegan and gluten-free?
faqPage.a2: Most of our products are vegan and gluten-free. Detailed information is available on each product page.
faqPage.a3: We ship orders within 1ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В“2 business days. Delivery time is typically 2ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В“5 business days. Free shipping on orders over ГѓВўГ‚В‚Г‚В¬49.
faqPage.a4: Yes, we have a 14-day right of return. Unopened products can be returned in original packaging. Return costs are the customer's responsibility.
faqPage.q5: Are products suitable for children or pregnant women?
faqPage.a5: Products are intended for adults. Pregnant women, breastfeeding mothers and those under 18 should consult a doctor before use.
faqPage.q6: Do I get a discount if I order multiple products?
faqPage.a6: We regularly offer promotions and bundle deals. Subscribe to our newsletter to stay updated.
faqPage.ctaSubtitle: Our customer service is happy to help.

aboutPage.title: We are Robust Nordic
aboutPage.subtitle: We believe wellbeing is everyone's right ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В“ and it starts with pure, effective supplements.
aboutPage.value1Desc: We use only clean, carefully selected ingredients with no unnecessary additives.
aboutPage.value2Desc: Our formulations are based on proven research and nutritional expertise.
aboutPage.value3Desc: We openly share what is in our products вЂ“ and what is not.
aboutPage.value4Desc: We operate with respect for the environment and a long-term perspective.
aboutPage.p1: Robust Nordic was founded out of a genuine need вЂ“ the desire to offer clean, high-quality supplements without compromise.
aboutPage.p2: Our team consists of experts in health, nutrition and sports who believe in honesty and transparency in everything we do.

storyPage.metaDescription: Read the Robust Nordic story ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В“ how the brand started and what drives us.
storyPage.title: How it all started
storyPage.subtitle: Robust Nordic was born out of frustration with low-quality supplements.
storyPage.p1: It all began with the wonders of Nordic nature and a personal journey towards better wellbeing.
storyPage.p2: Our founder noticed that the supplements on the market were full of unnecessary additives and unclear formulations.
storyPage.p3: He decided to develop his own formulations together with nutrition experts вЂ“ with purity and efficacy as guiding principles.
storyPage.p4: The first product was created inspired by Finland's clean nature: minimalist, effective and completely transparent.
storyPage.p5: Today Robust Nordic is a growing brand backed by a team of passionate wellness professionals.
storyPage.p6: We believe that everyone deserves high-quality supplements that actually work.
storyPage.p7: Nordic nature, scientific research and genuine care вЂ“ that is the story of Robust Nordic.

qualityPage.metaDescription: Robust Nordic is committed to the highest quality ГѓВўГ‚ВЂГ‚В“ read how we ensure product quality.
qualityPage.title: Quality above all
qualityPage.subtitle: Every Robust Nordic product goes through a rigorous quality control process.
qualityPage.c1Desc: All our products are manufactured in GMP-certified facilities to the highest standards.
qualityPage.c2Desc: Our products are made in Finland in the spirit of Nordic purity.
qualityPage.c3Desc: Every product is tested in an independent laboratory to verify purity and potency.
qualityPage.c4Desc: We use no synthetic additives, fillers, or unnecessary binders.
qualityPage.c5Desc: Our products are suitable for vegans and those with gluten sensitivity вЂ“ no compromise.
qualityPage.c6Desc: Our formulations are based on the latest nutritional science research.
